title: Junior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Junior Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a Junior Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for building responsive and user-friendly web applications using React, JavaScript/TypeScript, CSS, and HTML.

Responsibilities:
- Develop high-quality frontend code using React, JavaScript/TypeScript, CSS, and HTML
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces
- Work with backend engineers to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the overall codebase
- Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend development trends and best practices

Must-have skills:
- React
- JavaScript/TypeScript
- CSS
- HTML
- Bootstrap
- Responsive web design
- Version control systems (Git)
- Basic understanding of backend development (APIs)

Nice to have:
- Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Cypress)
- Familiarity with containerization (Docker)
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines
